api::linux-vps-hosting-page.linux-vps-ho.heroTitle: Fast, Flexible & Developer-Ready — Linux VPS Hosting That Scales with You

api::linux-vps-hosting-page.linux-vps-ho.faqTitle: FAQs About ICSDC Linux VPS Hosting
api::linux-vps-hosting-page.linux-vps-ho.faqContactDesc:
Our Linux VPS specialists are available 24/7 to help with setup, configuration, migration, and performance optimization.

📞 +91 98109 58857

faq.question: What is a Linux VPS and how is it different from shared hosting?
faq.answer: A Linux VPS (Virtual Private Server) gives you dedicated resources — your own vCPU, RAM, and SSD storage — that are never shared with other users. Shared hosting means your resources are divided among hundreds of sites, causing unpredictable performance. A VPS gives you consistent speed and full root access.

faq.question: How quickly will my VPS be ready?
faq.answer: ICSDC Linux VPS instances are provisioned and ready within 60 seconds of payment confirmation. You'll receive SSH credentials immediately, and your server will be fully online.

faq.question: Can I choose my Linux distribution?
faq.answer: Yes. ICSDC supports Ubuntu 22.04 LTS, Debian 12, CentOS 9 Stream, AlmaLinux 9, Rocky Linux 9, and FreeBSD. You can also request custom OS images for specialized deployments.

faq.question: Can I upgrade my VPS plan later?
faq.answer: Yes. You can upgrade your VPS to a higher plan (more CPU, RAM, or storage) at any time from your control panel. Most upgrades require a brief restart — typically under 60 seconds.

faq.question: Are backups included in VPS plans?
faq.answer: Yes. All ICSDC Linux VPS plans include free automated daily backups with 7-day retention. You can restore your entire VPS or individual files with a single click from the management panel.

faq.question: Can I install cPanel, Plesk, or any control panel?
faq.answer: Absolutely. With full root access, you can install any control panel — cPanel/WHM, Plesk, DirectAdmin, Webmin, or any custom solution. Control panel licenses are available through ICSDC.
